arts.ttl: Erling Haaland OUT of Manchester City's next match after flying back to Norway
arts.sum: Manchester City will be without Erling Haaland for their Carabao Cup tie with Watford on Tuesday night, after the striker returned to Norway on Monday

arts.ttl: 'No divine right': Chris Sutton now slams second Man City man alongside John Stones after his Arsenal display
arts.sum: Manchester City and Arsenal played out an entertaining 2-2 draw yesterday with plenty of talking points and Chris Sutton has picked out another Man City...

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Watford injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Manchester City and Watford.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland to miss Man City game after flying back to Norway
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland will not feature against Watford on Tuesday night after being given permission to attend a funeral

arts.ttl: Ilkay Gundogan rejects Arsenal complaints with 'emotional' Man City declaration
arts.sum: A number of Manchester City players have taken aim at Arsenal's tactics in the aftermath of their 2-2 draw at the Etihad on Sunday, but Ilkay Gundogan has looked inwards in his analysis of the match

arts.ttl: Revealed: The Premier League's biggest time-wasters named and shamed with big club topping the list after Arsenal were accused of delaying tactics at Man City
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side have come under fire for alleged gamesmanship as they looked to protect a sensational victory during the second half at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Kovacic in, Walker and Gundogan roles - Three ways Man City can line up after Rodri injury blow
arts.sum: The latest Manchester City news as the midfielder looks set to be on the sidelines for some time after suffering a knee injury against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Martin Zubimendi, Adam Wharton and three other Man City replacements for Rodri after injury blow
arts.sum: Manchester City might have to turn to the January transfer window following the news to Rodri's injury after he was withdrawn against Arsenal

arts.ttl: Manchester City dealing with Kevin De Bruyne uncertainty following Rodri blow
arts.sum: Manchester City are sweating over the fitness of Kevin De Bruyne ahead of Saturday afternoon's trip to Newcastle United in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'Rodri injury could be a season-changing blow': Man City expert 'nervous' amid midfielder concern
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole that Rodri's knee injury sustained in the 2-2 draw with Arsenal on Sunday "could be a season-changing blow" for Pep Guardiola's side.
